title: Insanity
wikitext:
[]: Insanity? Post by CyberXIII » Wed May 13, 2009 6:08 pm The characters in NGE ranged from somewhat evil (Gendo) to bats**t insane (Lilim) by the end of the series. My question is, what kind of mental illnesses did you see each character exhibit? Shinji was depressed (and likely suicidal), Gendo was pretty much a sociopath, Rei was emotionless, and Asuka was...was...well, words fail me. What do you guys and girls think?

[]: Post by BobBQ » Wed May 13, 2009 6:13 pm I think this has been discussed before. I also think you're oversimplifying.

[]: Post by CyberXIII » Wed May 13, 2009 6:23 pm BobBQ wrote: I think this has been discussed before. I also think you're oversimplifying.

[]: Post by ZapX » Wed May 13, 2009 6:27 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6093. There are more I'm too lazy to look for. Use the search.
